name: policy_uses_uncached_auth_function_clean
description: Wrapped (select auth.uid()) in policy USING is the cached form; SC-RLS03 must not fire
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE tenants (id bigint PRIMARY KEY, user_id uuid)
query_sql:
-- @name CreateTenantPolicy
-- @returns :exec
CREATE POLICY tenant ON tenants USING (user_id = (select auth.uid()))
